feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: vx11n in s4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to Activate VX11N  in S/4 Hana without using TRM.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Material list is empty in report malfunction
entry.content:
hello everyone 

I facing problem while trying to reserve spare part in report malfunction FIORI app material list does not appear any details for Material coeds , description 

FIORI APP ID = F2023

FIORI APP Name = report and repair malfunction

entry.title: R47 Delete ABAP Session after Error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to find out an error on our developement SAP instance. In SM21, we have messages "Delete ABAP session T208_U1004_M0(Info = Error Message [Error/Core]" we tried to check the dev_wp trace and found the below error 

*** WARNING => ThResFreeSession: free resources of T208_U1004_M0 (normal mode, complete free), rc=ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG, db_action=TH_DB_ROLLBACK [thxxmode.c 888]
***LOG R47=> ThResFreeSession, delete (ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG) [thxxmode.c 1172]
ThResFreeSession: delete T208_U1004_M0.

For the affected work process, the following information is shown in dispatcher trace (dev_disp)

DpHdlDeadWp: W29 (pid=7084) terminated automatically
DpWpDynCreate: created new work process W29-8238

Kindly help to find the root cause.

 

Regards,

Subasri

entry.title: Regarding the transfer acquisition method in LTMOM
entry.content:
We are currently considering data migration using LTMC.
Please provide guidance on the following two points.

1. Is it possible to create a project using LTMC in the development system and then transfer and import it to the validation system? 
If transfer is possible, please provide the transfer creation method. 

2. Is it possible to add items using LTMOM in the development system and then transfer and import them to the validation system? 
If transfer is possible, please provide the transfer creation method. 

Thank you & Regards,
Tsubasa 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Query regarding open authorization to maintain the working time schedules for the working time sheet
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Which authorizations must be defined so that I can generate the work schedules retrospectively?

Please find attached a screenshot with the authorizations to be clarified.

Best regards Henry

entry.title: Supplier evaluation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I need to configure supplier evaluation in current system.

But I have no idea from where I start.

Please guide steps so that successfully create the same. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Down payments on investment orders with capitalisation in asset accounting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have questions about down payment process on investment orders with capitalisation in asset accounting.

We post a purchase order for an internal investment order. Down payments are entered for this purchase order, sometimes before the goods receipt takes place. What customising do I have to do so that a down payment entered for a purchase order is available in the purchase order history?
In addition, the down payment should appear on the AuC after the internal order has been settled via KO88. As far as I know, the transaction type must be adjusted for this. What do I have to consider here in customising?
If I then want to carry out a partial capitalisation on fixed asset, I get the error FAA_POST075. What possible solutions are there?

entry.title: Adding new tabs in Manage Purchase Requisitions Professional
entry.content:
Need custom tab to display table information in Fiori app F2229. Please suggest recommended approach.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I am wondering if I can edit the Configurable Material assigned to a Material Variant when using AVC
entry.content: I am wondering if I can edit the Configurable Material assigned to a Material Variant when using AVC? Seems like this question was batted around back before AVC. I am wondering if the answer changed with the introduction of AVC. The problem I am facing is that I have an upstream PLM system that is feeding S/4 product data and that data isn't aggregated up to a high enough grouping level (configurable material). My options for changing the upstream system are limited. Looking for options.

entry.title: Hold Invoice Document does not exist
entry.content:
Hi,

What are the Programs that update the RBTX table upon posting MM Doc?

Thank you!

entry.title: When a delivery (ZLF) is created but not yet picked, does this update MARD-LABST in S4 HANA?
entry.content:
Suppose there is an open order for 100 units of an item in S4 HANA, and MARD-LABST shows 200 'Valuated Unrestricted-Use Stock'.

Now a delivery (ZLF) is created for the 100 units of the order. Does this immediately reduce MARD-LABST? Is it only reduced when the delivery has been picked? Despatched?

entry.title: Disable Object Page in List Report Developed in SAP Cloud Abap Development Enviornment
entry.content:
I have created a list report page on the first page it shows data in tabular format, but when I click on any of the lines it takes me to the inside object page but I don't need an object page in this report. 

How can I achieve this using Eclipse abap development?

I really appreciate any help you can provide. 

Screenshot's are attached below.

entry.title: Hi, I have few doubts around CBC:
entry.content:
1. During setting up of PE(Evaluation) in Starter System, I have learned that the Starter System Org Data is preconfigured with the Org Data mentioned in the Process Flow -Test Scripts(Signavio Process Nav.) for the ease of performing Fit To Standard Workshops. But is it possible to set up own set of Master Data(This is Client Request) as Org Data in Starter System?


2. As a Lead Configuration Expert/LOB Experts, the primary responsibility would be to ensure the phases/milestone are completed for the PE assigned to the Customizing Tenant(100) of the Starter/Development System. Do we need to perform the same activities(incl. Product Specific Configuration) for the PE assigned to the Development Tenant(80). If so why?

SAP Central Business Configuration SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Having an issue creating output type for email
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a new condition and output type to try and send an email to a person that wants to be notified anytime a sales order is created with their plant number.  I can't seem to find how to specify the email address for the user.  The typical partner functions (CP, SP, etc) don't let me specify the email address for this person.  It seems like this should be easy to do and I am just missing something.  Or is this something that can only be done by creating a new Process routine program?  

Thank you

entry.title: How to improve the performance of the Migration Cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We're using the Migration Cockpit's Direct Transfer approach in one of our Migration Projects, and in it we've noticed some long runtimes, depending on the circumstances. Sometimes, even the cancellation of a long running activity takes a little too long to finish. Since we're facing this, we'd like to ask:

  • Is there a way to improve the performance of the Migration Cockpit app?

Best regards,
Data Migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: missing Migration Objects Business partner, Letter of credit and Bank guarantee
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We wanted to test the following Migration Objects in one of our systems, using the Staging Tables migration method:

  • Business partner
  • Letter of credit
  • Bank guarantee

But we can't find them in the Migration Project creation screen!

Is there anything else we need to do or know to use these Migration Objects? We're using an SAP S/4HANA 2021.

Best regards,
Data Migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: IPS Sync Issue : S/4HANA Cloud Private edition User and Roles Sync
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We're trying to sync the users and their roles from SAP S/4Hana Cloud, Private Edition to Work Zone (standard) using IPS sync. 

We've followed the below process by referring the help documents. 

  • Configure the Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Application Server ABAP | SAP Help Portal
  • Configure Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal

However, while performing the sync we're getting issue "Initialization of repository destination <destination_name> Failed: No user identity is configured". 

S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition version : 2022 

Steps Followed: 

1. Established the cloud connector setup with BTP Subaccount 

2. Subscribed the SAP Identity service, connectivity plan to BTP subaccount based on IAS region

3. Created a dedicated destination with "RFC" as connection type with cloud connector information and checked the connection 

4. Created Source system with type "SAP Application Server ABAP" and selected the destination (point3).

5. Created target system with type "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition" 

6. Performed the Read / Resync action from the Source system. 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Transaction MB** updated in Goods Movement document in S/4 HANA system
entry.content:
Goods Movement posted with inbound Interface, system updated Transaction code as MB** in S/4 HANA system


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: External Commission Settlement of Invoices created directly from sales orders prior to delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

        We want to use condition contracts for payment of external commissions using condition contract technique to dealers. Business requirement mandates that no settlement should be done (accrual or actual payment) unless a delivery has been created. For sales from stock products we do not have an issue as billing always takes place post delivery. But for custom make to orders, we have order related billing and billing document is created much ahead of the delivery. However, since condition contract settlement gets triggered by billing, system doesnt check if the delivery for the custom order has been made or not. Is there any way to achieve this technically? I have looked for a BADI under Settlement process which allows us to cancel the settlement run for an entire contract if one of the invoices in the business volume is found to be without any delivery. But customer doesnt want this to happen- we need to skip only that particular invoice and settle the commissions for the remaining invoices where delivery has been made for the custom orders.

Please share your opinion on how we can achieve this - specifically, if there is any BADI which allows us the scope to remove the invoices (without delivery) from the business volume for calculating the settlement amount.

Thanks

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: OData V2 Request fails and no error message is displayed
entry.content:
Hi experts,

one of our customers faces an issue with one OData request, but I can't figure out the cause, because no error message is displayed in the response, and there are no entries in the /IWFND/ERROR_LOG or ST22.

The request is a simple GET request of an EntitySet. It happens only once if the user opens the application the first time of the browser session. There are several requests before that error request which are all successful. After a page refresh the error no longer occurs. 

This is the response of the request:

This is the request 

The customer is using a S/4HANA system and it only occurs on the test system, not the productive system.

Do you have any idea what could be causing the problem or how I can find out the exact cause?

 

Thanks in advance

Julia
